message:
test(conformance): add signal_ops and time_ops conformance test harnesses

Add dedicated conformance test suites for two more fixture families:

- signal_ops_conformance_test.rs (10 tests): validates signal_ops.json
  covering raise, kill, sigaction with both strict and hardened modes

- time_ops_conformance_test.rs (11 tests): validates time_ops.json
  covering time, clock, clock_gettime (REALTIME/MONOTONIC/invalid),
  localtime_r with clock ID coverage validation

Each harness validates fixture schema, coverage patterns, error codes,
function distribution, mode validity, and case count stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
